backup_summary.active_power_plan_export_failure_reason: Unable to perform operation. An unexpected error (0x522) has occurred: A required privilege is not held by the client.

app_ui_updates.branding: The app window and launch surface are now branded AeroTune.
app_ui_updates.layout: The PySide6 UI uses a cleaner top-tab layout, card sections, larger spacing, and an always-visible telemetry status bar.
editable_surfaces: CPU presets are editable with form controls and dropdowns for fixed-option settings.
GPU profile slots are editable as labeled cards while MSI profile launching remains blocked.
Game automation rules are editable as app-side JSON forms with automation disabled by default.
Auto Tuning experiment plans are editable as preview-only JSON plans.
app_ui_updates.read_only_tables: Tables remain for manifests, logs, sensor lists, process matches, and other read-only data.

sensor_integration.nvidia_smi: Read-only live telemetry is shown in the Sensors tab and status bar when nvidia-smi is available.
sensor_integration.presentmon: Discovered candidates are listed and opt-in capture controls were added. Capture does not start automatically.
sensor_integration.always_visible_status: GPU, VRAM, CPU/LHM, and FPS status are shown in the app status bar across all tabs.

known_issues: Active power plan .pow export is blocked from the current non-admin session by Windows privilege error 0x522.
Phase 5 readiness remains false until the active power plan export gate is resolved.
MSI profile slot mapping remains unverified.
Fan and EC controls remain blocked and research-only.
phase5_recommendation: Manual MSI profile slot verification and first real guarded active CPU preset apply/restore test. Require successful Phase 4 backup/restore gates first. Verify MSI slot mapping manually with telemetry before allowing app-launched MSI profiles. For CPU, allow one explicitly selected low/medium-risk setting apply to the active plan with immediate verification and one-click restore. No fan control or EC writes yet.
